Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class DiscoveryAIModel

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MetadataWithContent
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.DiscoveryAIModel
public class DiscoveryAIModel extends MetadataWithContent

Java class for DiscoveryAIModel complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DiscoveryAIModel">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MetadataWithContent">
       <sequence>
         <element name="algorithmType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryAlgorithmType"/>
         <element name="classificationThreshold" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="modelFields" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryModelField" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="modelRuntimeType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryModelRuntimeType"/>
         <element name="predictedField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="predictionType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryPredictionType"/>
         <element name="sourceType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryModelSourceType"/>
         <element name="status" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryAIModelStatus"/>
         <element name="trainingMetrics" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="transformations" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}DiscoveryModelTransform" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getModelFields

      public List<DiscoveryModelField> getModelFields()
      Gets the value of the modelFields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the modelFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getModelFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DiscoveryModelField

      Returns:
      The value of the modelFields property.

    • getModelRuntimeType

    • getTransformations

      public List<DiscoveryModelTransform> getTransformations()
      Gets the value of the transformations property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the transformations property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getTransformations().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DiscoveryModelTransform

      Returns:
      The value of the transformations property.
